description: Bold Eagle Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as Spinning Eagle Acquisition Corp. and changed its name to Bold Eagle Acquisition Corp. in June 2024. Bold Eagle Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2021 and is based in New York, New York.
mos_flag: NO — yield does not compensate for business risk
